name: Irisnet
tagline: Run configured AI checks on media and text
description: Inspect license information, list saved AI configurations, and submit text to an Irisnet V2 configuration for immediate policy and detection results.

auth.hint: Send the Irisnet license key in the LICENSE-KEY header and keep the key in Arthur MCP Secrets.

tools.name: get_license_info
tools.description: Return license information and account limits for the supplied Irisnet license key.

tools.name: list_ai_configurations
tools.description: List saved Irisnet AI configurations with their identifiers and configured prototypes.

tools.name: check_text
tools.description: Check text using a saved AI configuration and return summary, broken-rule, and detection details according to the requested detail level.

params.name: configId
params.description: UUID of a saved Irisnet configuration.

params.name: detail
params.description: Response detail level up to 3; level 1 is the documented default.

params.name: data
params.description: Text content to evaluate with the selected configuration.
